winner: I tried to move my towel, but it was too dry — it refused to budge unless I gave it a little *shake* of enthusiasm.

candidates.text: I told my friend I was going to move to a tropical island, but he said I should bring a towel first — turns out, he thought I was moving my beach vacation, not my entire life.
